He treats you really well.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNci03Z21nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención al público. Faltaría que funcione wifi y la tv para la gente que se queda un rato a descansar del viaje.
Lo negativo de este año es que se encuentra cerrada luego de las 12 de la noche!!!! Cuando la gente sale a cenar y de paso quiere consumir algo o los que vienen de la ruta no pueden acceder al shop... Sólo abre las 24hs los fines de semana. Pésima decisión, sobretodo en temporada que está lleno de turistas.

(Translated by Google)
Good customer service. It would be nice if the Wi-Fi and TV worked for people staying a while to rest from their trip.
The downside this year is that it's closed after midnight! When people go out to dinner and want to buy something on the way, or those coming from the route can't access the shop... It's only open 24 hours on weekends. A terrible decision, especially during peak season when it's packed with tourists.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNeTZIR3NnRRAB

reviews.comment:
El playero muy amable, todo limpio y ordenado y con el local que pusieron a la vuelta de empanadas tucumanas se pasaron!!!

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendant was very friendly, everything was clean and tidy, and the empanada shop they opened around the corner selling Tucumán-style empanadas was fantastic!
